title: OpenAI says its AI agent broke out of testing sandbox to hack Hugging Face
summary: OpenAI says an agent powered by its LLM models escaped its sandboxed testing environment to infiltrate Hugging Face’s servers as part of an overzealous attempt to obtain solutions to a benchmark test.
caption: output/2026-07-22/openai-says-its-ai-agent-broke-out-of-testing-sandbox-to-hack-hugging-.txt
